items.claim: Cody Durden has been finished seven times in his career.
items.quote: Cody Durden's been finished seven times.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has a 100% finish rate in his UFC wins, all by knockout.
items.quote: Costa, he has a 100% finish rate in the his UFC wins, all by knockout.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has been finished twice in the UFC, both under two and a half rounds.
items.quote: he's been finished twice in the UFC. Both those came under two and a half rounds
I do think his chin's a little bit questionable.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov rarely goes to a decision in his UFC career.
items.quote: Krylov like never goes the distance. Like, he's only been to decision like a couple times in the UFC

items.claim: Robert Whittaker and Nikita Krylov both have poor durability.
items.quote: I think both guys are very chinny.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is physically smaller than other fighters in his weight class.
items.quote: I'm looking at some of these videos circulate throughout the week and him standing next to guys like like Max Holloway like Max Holloway looks bigger than him.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is approaching the end of his career as a competitive fighter.
items.quote: I think he's been approached the the washed category.

items.claim: Elijah Ellison is poor at defending himself from his back.
items.quote: Ellison off his back is just horrible.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt lacks a durable chin.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt who's chinning. I mean who doesn't have a chin.

items.claim: Zachary Reese is extremely hittable and lacks defensive durability.
items.quote: I think he's extremely chinny. I think he's extremely hittable.

items.claim: Cezar Ferreira's chin is starting to decline.
items.quote: I think the chin is definitely starting to crack.

items.claim: Damian Pinas is one of the hardest hitters in his division.
items.quote: I truly believe he's one of the hardest hitters in the division.
